subcodes.first_line: O ye two precious handmaidens of the Divine! Today the greatest service unto the Abhá Kingdom is the kindling of the lamp of guidance and teaching [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو کنیز عزیز الهی الیوم اعظم خدمت بملکوت ابهی ایقاد سراج هدی و تبلیغ
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
